EditGame.description: Update the information and images of this platform.

MANAGE_DETAILS.description: Edit name, description, images, links and other game metadata.

MANAGE_EVENTS.description: Approve and moderate events created under this game.

MANAGE_STAFF.description: Add or remove administrators and edit their capabilities.

ApproveGame.title: Confirm Approval
ApproveGame.description: Are you sure you want to approve {gameName}? It will be visible to all users immediately.

DeleteGame.title: Delete Game
DeleteGame.warning: You are about to archive {gameName}. It will no longer be visible and {count, plural, one {its # event} other {its # events}} will also be archived. This can only be undone by an administrator.
DeleteGame.warningNoEvents: You are about to archive {gameName}. It will no longer be visible. This can only be undone by an administrator.

DeleteLeague.title: Delete Event
DeleteLeague.warning: You are about to archive “{eventName}”. It will no longer be visible. This can only be undone by an administrator.

AddGame.description: Fill in the details to add a new game to the platform.

AddEvent.title: Add Event
AddEvent.description: Fill in the details for the new event or competition.

slug.label: Identifier
slug.tooltip: Personalizes the URL for this league (e.g., /events/pro-league).
slug.taken: This identifier is already in use for this game.

aboutField.label: About
aboutField.placeholder: Write something about this event — rules, context, schedule, or anything you want participants to know...
aboutField.hint: This content will be shown on the event page. Supports rich text formatting.

AddEvent.uploadError: Failed to upload image. Please try again.

ratingSystem.label: Classification System
ratingSystem.elo_description: Skill-based system where ratings shift based on the opponent's level.
ratingSystem.points_description: Fixed-point system per result, ideal for standings and traditional leagues.

eventType.label: Event Type
eventType.league_description: Continuous competition with standings and a rating system.
eventType.tournament_description: Competition with brackets and elimination stages.

participationMode.label: Participation Mode
participationMode.solo_description: Each competitor participates individually, without teams.
participationMode.team_description: Competitors form teams to compete in matches.

allowDraw.label: Allow Draw
allowDraw.tooltip: Specify if draws are possible in this game's business rules.

kFactor.label: K-Factor
kFactor.tooltip: Determines how much the league changes after a match. Higher values make it more volatile.

scoreRelevance.label: Score Relevance
scoreRelevance.tooltip: Determines how much the final score difference influences the rating change. Higher values grant more bonuses for crushing victories.

inactivityDecay.label: Inactivity decay (daily)
inactivityDecay.tooltip: Points lost for each day of inactivity.

inactivityThreshold.label: Hours until inactivity
inactivityThreshold.tooltip: Time without matches before decay starts.

inactivityFloor.label: Floor
inactivityFloor.tooltip: Minimum rating a player can reach via inactivity decay.

elo.title: Elo System
elo.description: Rating shifts scale with surprise — beating a stronger opponent earns far more than beating a weaker one, and losing to a weaker player costs far more than losing to a stronger one.
elo.relevance_1: Win margin is ignored; only the final result matters.
elo.relevance_2: Win margin has low impact on the final calculation.
elo.relevance_3: Win margin has moderate impact on performance.
elo.relevance_4: Win margin is highly relevant for point gains.
elo.relevance_5: Close wins barely move ratings; only a dominant, decisive score margin earns meaningful Elo gains.
elo.match_impact: Results in this league typically move ratings by around {kFactor} pts.
elo.decay: Inactive players lose {amount} points daily after {window} without playing (Floor: {floor}).

simulate.title: Match Simulator
simulate.footer: S = score component in Elo. Closer to 0.5 means less Elo exchanged.

points.title: Points System
points.description: A fixed amount of points is awarded for each match outcome.

game.title: Select a Game
game.description: Choose which game this event is for, or enter a custom name if it isn't listed.

format.title: Event Format
format.description: Define the ranking system, league rules, and allowed match types.

structure.title: Event Structure
structure.description: Define the competition basics before configuring the league rules.

general.title: Event Details
general.description: Set the public-facing name, URL identifier, description, and official links for this event.

officialLinks.label: Official Links (Optional)
officialLinks.tooltip: Add links like Discord, stream, rulebook, etc.

settings.title: Event Access
settings.description: Control visibility, max capacity, the registration window, and the event's current phase.

status.label: Status
status.tooltip: Sets the event's current phase. Draft = setup in progress; Open Registration = enrollment period; In Progress = event running; Finished and Cancelled become available after the event is created.
status.tooltipFinished: available after the event is created
status.tooltipCancelled: available after the event is created

visibility.label: Visibility
visibility.public_description: Anyone can find and view this event.
visibility.private_description: Only members with access can view this event.

maxParticipants.label: Max Capacity (Optional)
maxParticipants.tooltip: Maximum number of participants accepted. Leave blank for unlimited.

openRegistrations.label: Open registrations
openRegistrations.tooltip: If enabled, participants can sign up for this event on their own.
openRegistrations.datesHint: Leave blank to keep registrations open indefinitely.

eventDates.label: Event Dates
eventDates.hint: Optional dates indicating when the event begins and ends.

requiresApproval.label: Registrations require approval
requiresApproval.tooltip: When enabled, participants' registrations are held in a pending queue until approved by an organizer. Useful when you want to control who gets in.

waitlist.label: Waitlist
waitlist.tooltip: When max capacity is reached, new registrations join a waitlist and can take spots that open up.

officialLinks.label: Official Links (Optional)
officialLinks.tooltip: Add links like Discord, stream, rulebook, etc.

participants.title: Participants
participants.description: Add the players who will compete in this event. You can link them to Bellona accounts to track stats and identity.
participants.emptyHint: You can add participants later from the event page or users can join themselves.
participants.duplicateName: Another participant already uses this name.
participants.removeConfirmDesc: This participant has recorded matches. Removing them may affect standings. Are you sure?

staff.title: Event Staff
staff.description: Define who can help manage this event. You always retain full access as the creator.
staff.searchPlaceholder: Search for a user by name or username...
staff.fullAccessDescription: Acts as a co-organizer with every capability granted.

MANAGE_DETAILS.description: Edit name, description, dates, links and other event metadata.

MANAGE_PARTICIPANTS.label: Manage participants
MANAGE_PARTICIPANTS.description: Add, remove and approve entries, registrations and claims.

MANAGE_MATCHES.label: Manage matches
MANAGE_MATCHES.description: Schedule, edit and record outcomes of matches.

MANAGE_STAFF.label: Manage staff
MANAGE_STAFF.description: Add or remove staff members and edit their capabilities.

matchFormats.title: Allowed Match Types
matchFormats.help: Choose all match types accepted for this league.
matchFormats.required: Select at least one match type.

gameSelect.placeholder: Select or type the game name...
gameSelect.newGameWarning: This game does not exist yet and will be created automatically.
gameSelect.newGameInstructions: Make absolutely sure the game doesn't exist before proceeding.
gameSelect.confirmUnknownTitle: Are you sure you couldn't find this game?
gameSelect.confirmUnknownDescription: Please confirm that you searched the site and that this game really does not exist before moving to the next step.

confirm.title: Confirm Creation

welcome.title: Welcome to Bellona
welcome.subtitle: Your competitive journey starts here. Let's set up your warrior profile in a few quick steps.

identity.title: Your Identity
identity.subtitle: Choose how you'll be known on the battlefield.
identity.urlHint: This is the unique link to your public profile. You can change it later.

country.title: Where are you from?
country.subtitle: Your country flag will appear next to your name in leaderboards.
country.hint: This is optional. You can always set it later in your profile settings.

games.title: What do you play?
games.subtitle: Pick the games you're interested in. We'll personalize your experience.
games.hint: Don't worry — you can update your interests anytime.

complete.title: You're all set!
complete.subtitle: Your profile is ready. Time to jump into the arena and start competing.

NotFound.title: This battle doesn't exist
NotFound.description: The battlefield you're looking for was deactivated, never existed, or was deleted from the server.
